calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:30 a.m., that there is no appearance by anyone from the Bresler & Lee firm, that there is an issue regarding venue and that counsel has been given an opportunity to file and argue the issue but has not done so. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was denied as to improper venue.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
